training.loss_notes: default CrossEntropyLoss over flattened target-gene classes

pipeline_program.target_side: official target gene order features from target_genes.tsv
pipeline_program.prior: official DEG task contract and target gene order
pipeline_program.head: parent dense logits plus low-rank target-specific residual classifier
pipeline_program.training_strategy: weighted cross entropy from parent config
pipeline_program.paper_alignment: factorized low-rank DEG classifier over official 6640 target genes
